{{Use dmy dates|date=January 2026}}
{{infobox football tournament season
|title                      = Copa do Brasil
|year                       = 2025
|country                    = Brazil
|dates                      = {{nowrap|18 February – 21 December}}<ref name=GE/>
|num_teams                  = 92
|champions                  = [[SC Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] {{small|(4th title)}}
|runner-up                  = [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|continentalcup1            = [[2026 Copa Libertadores]]
|continentalcup1 qualifiers = [[SC Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|matches                    = 122
|goals                      = 279
|scoring_leader             = [[Kaio Jorge]]<br />[[Rayan (footballer, born 2006)|Rayan]]<br />(5 goals each)
|player                     = [[Hugo Souza]] (Corinthians)
|goalkeeper                 = Hugo Souza (Corinthians)
|prev_season                = [[2024 Copa do Brasil|2024]]
|next_season                = [[2026 Copa do Brasil|2026]]
}}

The '''2025 Copa do Brasil''' (officially the '''Copa Betano do Brasil 2025''' for sponsorship reasons)<ref>{{Cite web |date=1 December 2022 |title=Exclusivo: Betano terá title sponsor da Copa do Brasil até 2025 |url=https://maquinadoesporte.com.br/futebol/exclusivo-betano-tera-title-sponsor-da-copa-do-brasil-ate-2025/ |access-date=1 January 2024 |publisher=Máquina do Esporte |language=pt-BR}}</ref> was the 37th edition of Brazil's [[domestic cup]], the [[Copa do Brasil]]. It was held from 18 February to 21 December 2025.<ref name=GE>{{cite web|url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/noticia/2025/08/23/cbf-muda-calendario-de-2025-antecipa-fim-do-brasileirao-e-adia-final-da-copa-do-brasil.ghtml|title=CBF muda calendário de 2025, antecipa fim do Brasileirão e adia final da Copa do Brasil|trans-title=CBF changes the 2025 calendar, brings forward the end of the Brasileirão and postpones the Copa do Brasil final|publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]]|language=pt-BR|date=23 August 2025|accessdate=22 September 2025}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/noticia/2024/11/12/calendario-do-futebol-brasileiro-em-2025-veja-as-datas.ghtml|title=Calendário do futebol brasileiro em 2025: veja as datas|trans-title=2025 Brazilian football calendar: see dates|publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]]|language=pt-BR|date=12 November 2024|accessdate=14 November 2024}}</ref> [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]] were the defending champions but they were eliminated in the round of 16 by [[Atlético Mineiro]].

[[SC Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] defeated [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] 2–1 in the final to win their fourth title. As champions, Corinthians qualified for the [[2026 Copa Libertadores]] group stage and the [[2026 Supercopa do Brasil]].<ref>{{Cite web |date=10 November 2024 |title=Corinthians vence Vasco e conquista seu quarto título da Copa do Brasil |url=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/copa-brasil-masculino/a/corinthians-vence-vasco-e-conquista-seu-quarto-titulo-da-copa-do-brasil |access-date=21 December 2025 |website=Confederação Brasileira de Futebol |language=pt-br }}</ref>

==Qualified teams==
Each state league received a number of berths based on their [[CBF ranking#2024 State Ranking|state ranking]]. The states chose how to distribute those berths between league placements and state cup champions. Teams in '''bold''' enter the competition in the third round.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://ge.globo.com/sp/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2024/11/17/santos-e-ponte-preta-garantem-vaga-na-copa-do-brasil-2025-veja-classificados.ghtml|title=Santos e Ponte Preta garantem vaga na Copa do Brasil 2025; veja classificados|trans-title=Santos and Ponte Preta assure spot in the 2025 Copa do Brasil; see qualified teams|publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]]|language=pt-BR|date=17 November 2024|accessdate=18 November 2024}}</ref>
{| class="wikitable"
!Association
!Team
!Qualification method
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{Flag|Acre}}<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Independência Futebol Clube|Independência]]
|2024 [[Campeonato Acreano]] champions
|-
|[[Sport Clube Humaitá|Humaitá]]
|2024 Campeonato Acreano runners-up
|-
| rowspan="4" |{{Flag|Alagoas}}<br>{{small|3 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]'''
|'''[[2024 Copa do Nordeste]] runners-up'''

|-

|2024 Campeonato Alagoano 3rd place

|2024 Campeonato Alagoano play-off winners
|-

|-

==Schedule==
On 12 November 2024, [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]] published the 2025 Copa do Brasil schedule:<ref>{{Cite web |title=Calendário do futebol brasileiro em 2025: veja as datas |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/noticia/2024/11/12/calendario-do-futebol-brasileiro-em-2025-veja-as-datas.ghtml |access-date=27 November 2024 |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |date=12 November 2024 |language=pt-BR}}</ref>
{| class="wikitable"
|+Single-legged rounds
!Stage
! colspan="2" |Week 1
!Week 2
|-
|First round
| colspan="2" |18 February
|27 February
|-
|Second round
| colspan="2" |5 March
|12 March
|}
{| class="wikitable"
|+Two-legged rounds
!Stage
!First leg
!Second leg
|-
|Third round
|30 April
|21 May
|-
|Round of 16
|30 July
|6 August
|-
|Quarter-finals
|27 August
|11 September
|-
|Semi-finals<ref>{{Cite web |title=Vasco and Cruzeiro advance and define duels in the semifinals of the Copa do Brasil|url=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/copa-brasil/masculino/vasco-e-cruzeiro-avancam-e-definem-duelos-das-semifinais-da-copa-do-brasil  |publisher=[[Brazilian Football Confederation]] |date=12 September 2025 |access-date=12 October 2025|language=pt-BR}}</ref>
|10 December
|14 December
|-
|Finals
|17 December
|21 December
|}

==Single-legged rounds==
The draw for the first and second rounds was held on 7 February 2025 at the CBF headquarters in [[Rio de Janeiro]].<ref>{{Cite web |date=7 February 2025 |title=Primeira fase da Copa do Brasil 2025: veja quais serão os confrontos|url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2025/02/07/primeira-fase-da-copa-do-brasil-2025-veja-quais-serao-os-confrontos.ghtml |trans-title=2025 Copa do Brasil first round: see which matches will be played |access-date=11 March 2025 |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |language=pt-br }}</ref> Teams were seeded into eight groups as per their [[CBF ranking|national ranking]]. Matches were drawn using pot A vs E, B vs F, C vs G, and D vs H; lower-ranked teams host the match in the first round.<ref>{{Cite web |date=7 February 2025 |title=Copa do Brasil 2025: veja os potes e como funciona o sorteio da primeira fase |trans-title=2025 Copa do Brasil: see the pots and how the first phase draw will be made|url=https://www.olympics.com/pt/noticias/copa-do-brasil-2025-potes-sorteio-primeira-fase |access-date=11 March 2025 |publisher=Olympics.com |language=pt-br }}</ref>

;Draw
{{small|Each CBF team's ranking is shown in parentheses.}}
{| class="wikitable" width="100%"
|-
!width="25%"|Pot A
!width="25%"|Pot B
!width="25%"|Pot C
!width="25%"|Pot D
|-

|-
|
* [[Sousa Esporte Clube|Sousa]] <small>(69)</small>

* [[Tocantinópolis Esporte Clube|Tocantinópolis]] <small>(71)</small>

* [[Maracanã Esporte Clube|Maracanã]] <small>(=153)</small>
* [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube (Natal)|Santa Cruz de Natal]] <small>(=153)</small>
* [[Grêmio Atlético Sampaio|GAS]] <small>(176)</small>
* [[Rio Branco Atlético Clube|Rio Branco-ES]] <small>(186)</small>
* [[Rio Branco Futebol Clube|Rio Branco de Venda Nova]] <small>(202)</small>
* [[Olaria Atlético Clube|Olaria]] <small>(208)</small>
* [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] <small>(213)</small>
|
* [[CA Votuporanguense|Votuporanguense]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Guarany Futebol Clube|Guarany de Bagé]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Barcelona Futebol Clube|Barcelona de Ilhéus]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Associação Desportiva Jequié|Jequié]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Capital CF|Capital]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Independência Futebol Clube|Independência]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[União Atlético Clube|União-TO]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Barcelona Futebol Clube (RO)|Barcelona-RO]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Dourados Atlético Clube|Dourados]] <small>(—)</small>
* [[Oratório Recreativo Clube|Oratório]] <small>(—)</small>
|}

===First round===
The first round was contest by 80 teams and they played between 18 and 27 February 2025, in a [[Single-elimination tournament|single knock-out match format]]. The 40 winning teams advanced to the second round.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://ge.globo.com/pe/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2025/02/09/copa-do-brasil-veja-tabela-detalhada-da-primeira-fase.ghtml|title=Copa do Brasil: veja tabela detalhada da primeira fase|trans-title=Copa do Brasil: see the detailed table of the first round|publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |language=pt-BR|date=9 February 2025|accessdate=12 February 2025}}</ref>

|date=19 February 2025
|time=21:30
|team1='''[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]]'''
|score=1–1

}}

===Second round===
The second round was contest by the 40 teams qualified from the first round and they played between 4 and 13 March 2025, in a single knock-out match format. The 20 winning teams advanced to the third round.

{{footballbox collapsible
|date=12 March 2025
|time=21:30
|team1='''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]'''
|score=1–1
|report=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/jogos/copa-do-brasil/masculino/2025/atletico-goianiense-saf-x-retro/829091

|attendance=2,492

}}

==Two-legged rounds==
===Third round===
The draw for the third round was held on 9 April 2025 at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Sorteio da terceira fase da Copa do Brasil 2025: veja data e horário |date=6 April 2025 |url=https://ge.globo.com/pe/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2025/04/06/sorteio-da-terceira-fase-da-copa-do-brasil-2025-veja-data-e-horario.ghtml |access-date=6 April 2025 |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |language=pt-BR}}</ref> The 20 teams qualified from the previous round additionally to the 12 teams that will be enter from this round were placed into two pots, seeded by their [[CBF ranking|national ranking]], and then drawn into 16 ties. The competition from this round onwards will be played on a home-and-away [[Two-legged tie|two-legged]] basis.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Copa do Brasil 2025: veja os classificados para a terceira fase e como funciona o sorteio |url=https://www.olympics.com/pt/noticias/copa-do-brasil-2025-classificados-terceira-fase-sorteio |access-date=18 March 2025 |publisher=Olympics.com |language=pt-BR}}</ref> The winning teams advanced to the round of 16.

====Draw====
{{small|Each CBF team's ranking is shown in parentheses and the teams entering from this round are in '''bold'''.}}
{| class="wikitable" width=42%
|-
!width=30%| Pot A
!width=30%| Pot B
|-
|
* [[CR Flamengo|'''Flamengo''']] (1)
* [[São Paulo FC|'''São Paulo''']] (2)
* [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|'''Palmeiras''']] (3)
* [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|'''Corinthians''']] (4)
* [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] (5)
* [[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]] (6)
* [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]] (7)
* [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|'''Botafogo''']] (8)
* [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|'''Fortaleza''']] (9)
* [[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]] (10)
* [[Esporte Clube Bahia|'''Bahia''']] (11)
* [[Sport Club Internacional|'''Internacional''']] (12)
* [[Red Bull Bragantino]] (14)
* [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] (15)
* [[Santos FC|'''Santos''']] (16)
* [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|'''Cruzeiro''']] (19)
|
* [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] (22)
* [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] (26)
* [[Clube de Regatas Brasil|'''CRB''']] (27)
* [[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova]] (29)
* [[Operário Ferroviário Esporte Clube|Operário Ferroviário]] (31)
* [[Brusque Futebol Clube|Brusque]] (35)
* [[Grêmio Novorizontino|Novorizontino]] (39)
* [[Paysandu Sport Club|'''Paysandu''']] (41)
* [[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]] (42)
* [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] (46)
* [[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo-PB]] (53)
* [[Associação Atlética Aparecidense|Aparecidense]] (59)
* [[Retrô Futebol Clube Brasil|Retrô]] (63)
* [[Maringá Futebol Clube|Maringá]] (73)
* [[Maracanã Esporte Clube|Maracanã]] (153)
* [[Capital CF|Capital]] (—)
|}

====Matches====
The third round pairings are:<ref>{{cite web |title=Sorteio da terceira fase da Copa do Brasil: assista ao vivo |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/ao-vivo/sorteio-da-terceira-fase-da-copa-do-brasil-assista-ao-vivo.ghtml |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |language=pt-BR |access-date=9 April 2025}}</ref>
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Operário Ferroviário Esporte Clube|Operário Ferroviário]]| |2–2 {{pen|6–7}}|'''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Operário Ferroviário v Vasco da Gama|1–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Vasco da Gama v Operário Ferroviário|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]'''| |5–1|[[Associação Atlética Aparecidense|Aparecidense]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Fluminense v Aparecidense|1–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Aparecidense v Fluminense|4–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]| |0–5|'''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Paysandu v Bahia|0–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Bahia v Paysandu|0–4]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]'''| |4–1|[[Capital CF|Capital]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Botafogo v Capital|4–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Capital v Botafogo|0–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''| |4–0|[[Maracanã Esporte Clube|Maracanã]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Internacional v Maracanã|1–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Maracanã v Internacional|3–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Retrô Futebol Clube Brasil|Retrô]]'''| |2–2 {{pen|4–1}}|[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Retrô v Fortaleza|1–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Fortaleza v Retrô|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Brusque Futebol Clube|Brusque]]| |0–1|'''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Brusque v Athletico Paranaense|0–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Athletico Paranaense v Brusque|0–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]| |0–4|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Ceará v Palmeiras|0–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Palmeiras v Ceará|0–3]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Maringá Futebol Clube|Maringá]]| |2–6|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Maringá v Atlético Mineiro|2–2]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Atlético Mineiro v Maringá|0–4]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo-PB]]| |2–5|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Botafogo-PB v Flamengo|0–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Flamengo v Botafogo-PB|2–4]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''| |4–2|[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#São Paulo v Náutico|2–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Náutico v São Paulo|2–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''| |5–0|[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Cruzeiro v Vila Nova|2–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Vila Nova v Cruzeiro|3–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Santos FC|Santos]]| |1–1 {{pen|4–5}}|'''[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Santos v CRB|1–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#CRB v Santos|0–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Grêmio Novorizontino|Novorizontino]]| |0–2|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Novorizontino v Corinthians|0–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Corinthians v Novorizontino|0–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]| |1–6|'''[[Red Bull Bragantino]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Criciúma v Red Bull Bragantino|1–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Red Bull Bragantino v Criciúma|0–6]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]]'''| |3–2|[[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#CSA v Grêmio|3–2]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Grêmio v CSA|0–0]]}}
{{end}}

===Round of 16===
The draw for the round of 16 were held on 2 June 2025 at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro. The 16 teams qualified from the previous round was placed into a single pot and then drawn into eight ties.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Sorteio das oitavas de final da Copa do Brasil 2025: veja data e horário |url=https://ge.globo.com/al/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2025/05/23/sorteio-das-oitavas-de-copa-do-brasil-2025-veja-data-e-horario.ghtml |access-date=23 May 2025 |publisher=ge |language=pt-BR}}</ref> The winning teams will advance to the quarter-finals.

====Draw====
{{small|Each CBF team's ranking is shown in parentheses.}}
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!width="210"|Single pot
|- valign="top"
|
* [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]] (1)
* [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] (2)
* [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] (3)
* [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] (4)
* [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] (5)
* [[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]] (6)
* [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]] (7)
* [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] (8)
* [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] (11)
* [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] (12)
* [[Red Bull Bragantino]] (14)
* [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] (15)
* [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] (19)
* [[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]] (27)
* [[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]] (42)
* [[Retrô Futebol Clube Brasil|Retrô]] (63)
|}

====Matches====
The round of 16 pairings are:<ref>{{cite web |title=Oitavas de final da Copa do Brasil 2025: veja os confrontos e mandos de campo |url=https://ge.globo.com/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2025/06/02/oitavas-de-final-da-copa-do-brasil-2025-veja-os-confrontos.ghtml |publisher=[[Grupo Globo|ge]] |language=pt-BR |access-date=2 June 2025}}</ref>
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]| |2–2 {{pen|0–3}}|'''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#São Paulo v Athletico Paranaense|2–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Athletico Paranaense v São Paulo|0–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]| |1–1 {{pen|3–4}}|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Flamengo v Atlético Mineiro|0–1]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Atlético Mineiro v Flamengo|1–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''| |3–2|[[Retrô Futebol Clube Brasil|Retrô]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Bahia v Retrô|3–2]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Retrô v Bahia|0–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]| |2–3|'''[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Internacional v Fluminense|1–2]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Fluminense v Internacional|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''| |2–0|[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Cruzeiro v CRB|0–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#CRB v Cruzeiro|2–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]]| |1–3|'''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#CSA v Vasco da Gama|0–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Vasco da Gama v CSA|1–3]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''| |3–0|[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Corinthians v Palmeiras|1–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Palmeiras v Corinthians|2–0]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]'''| |3–0|[[Red Bull Bragantino]]||[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Botafogo v Red Bull Bragantino|2–0]]|[[2025 Copa do Brasil#Red Bull Bragantino v Botafogo|1–0]]}}
{{end}}

====First leg====

}}

==Final rounds==
The draw for the quarter-finals was held on 12 August 2025 at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Quartas da Copa do Brasil: chaveamento, datas, sorteio e o que você precisa saber até a decisão|url=https://www.espn.com.br/futebol/copa-do-brasil/artigo/_/id/15512435/copa-do-brasil-quartas-de-final-chaveamento-datas-sorteio-que-voce-precisa-saber-decisao|access-date=8 August 2025|publisher=ESPN Brazil|language=pt-BR}}</ref> The last 8 teams qualified from the round of 16 was placed into a single pot and then drawn until the finals, also played on a home-and-away two-legged basis.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Copa do Brasil 2025: veja data do sorteio das quartas de final|url=https://ge.globo.com/pe/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2025/08/06/cbf-marca-data-dos-sorteios-da-copa-do-brasil-feminina-e-masculina.ghtml|access-date=6 August 2025|publisher=ge|language=pt-BR}}</ref>

===Draw===
{{small|Each CBF team's ranking is shown in parentheses.}}
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!width="210"|Single pot
|- valign="top"
|
* [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] (4)
* [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] (5)
* [[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]] (6)
* [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]] (7)
* [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] (8)
* [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] (11)
* [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] (15)
* [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] (19)
|}

{{8TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n|nowrap=y
| team-width = 180
| RD1 = [[#Quarter-finals|Quarter-finals]]
| RD2 = [[#Semi-finals|Semi-finals]]
| RD3 = [[#Finals|Finals]]

===Quarter-finals===
====First leg====
{{footballbox collapsible
|date=27 August 2025
|time=19:30
|team1=[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
|score=0–2
|report=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/jogos/copa-do-brasil/masculino/2025/atletico-mineiro-saf-x-cruzeiro-saf/831738

|attendance=44,286

====Second leg====

{{footballbox collapsible
|date=11 September 2025
|time=21:30

|time=19:00

}}

===Semi-finals===
The order of legs for the semi-finals was decided in a draw held on 22 October 2025 at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref name="finaldraw">{{Cite web |title=Semifinais da Copa do Brasil: CBF define mandos de campo de Cruzeiro x Corinthians e Vasco x Fluminense|url=https://www.espn.com.br/futebol/copa-do-brasil/artigo/_/id/15851360/copa-do-brasil-mandos-de-campo-semifinais-corinthians-x-cruzeiro-fluminense-x-vasco-e-final-2025|access-date=23 October 2025|publisher=ESPN Brazil|language=pt-BR}}</ref>

====First leg====
{{footballbox collapsible
|date=10 December 2025
|time=21:30
|team1=[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]
|score=0–1
|report=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/jogos/copa-do-brasil/masculino/2025/cruzeiro-saf-x-corinthians/831867
|team2=[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|goals1=
|goals2=[[Memphis Depay|Depay]] {{goal|21}}
|stadium=[[Mineirão]]
|location=[[Belo Horizonte]]
|attendance=59,052
|referee=[[Anderson Daronco]] ([[Federação Gaúcha de Futebol|Rio Grande do Sul]])
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|date=11 December 2025
|time=20:00
|team1=[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|score=2–1
|report=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/jogos/copa-do-brasil/masculino/2025/vasco-da-gama-saf-x-fluminense/831868
|team2=[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]
|goals1=
*[[Rayan (footballer, born 2006)|Rayan]] {{goal|49}}
*[[Pablo Vegetti|Vegetti]] {{goal|90+4}}
|goals2=
*[[Kevin Serna|Serna]] {{goal|22}}
|stadium=[[Maracanã Stadium|Maracanã]]
|location=[[Rio de Janeiro]]
|attendance=64,990
|referee=[[Raphael Claus]] ([[Federação Paulista de Futebol|São Paulo]])
}}

====Second leg====
{{footballbox collapsible
|date=14 December 2025
|time=18:00
|team1=[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]

===Finals===
{{main|2025 Copa do Brasil finals}}
The order of legs for the finals was decided in a draw held on 22 October 2025 at the CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref name="finaldraw" />

====First leg====
{{footballbox collapsible
|date=17 December 2025
|time=21:30
|team1=[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|score=0–0
|report=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/jogos/copa-do-brasil/masculino/2025/corinthians-x-vasco-da-gama-saf/831885
|team2=[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|goals1=
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Arena Corinthians]]
|location=[[São Paulo]]
|attendance=46,616
|referee=Rafael Rodrigo Klein ([[Federação Gaúcha de Futebol|Rio Grande do Sul]])
}}

====Second leg====
{{footballbox collapsible
|date=21 December 2025
|time=18:00
|team1='''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
|score=1–2
|report=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/jogos/copa-do-brasil/masculino/2025/vasco-da-gama-saf-x-corinthians/831886

|goals1=
* [[Nuno Moreira]] {{goal|41}}

|location=[[Rio de Janeiro]]
|attendance=67,111
|referee=[[Wilton Sampaio]] ([[Federação Goiana de Futebol|Goiás]])
}}

{{winners||Copa do Brasil<br>2025 champions|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]|4th}}
